author: PC Gamer
text:
GTA 6's preorders mark the start of a long wait for it to come to PC, despite the fact we'll likely make up '50% of the sales'
What are we, chopped liver?

author: PC Gamer
text:
You can finally turn Riot's Vanguard anti-cheat off when you're not playing a game
Most of you, anyway.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Now we know how much GTA 6 costs, but can you remember what these other games cost at launch? Take our price tag quiz!
There's always a price.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Tim Sweeney on the future of games, AI, and whether Valve will ever join forces with Epic: 'It's now clear that nobody's going to end up with an absolute monopoly'
The Epic Games CEO discusses his vision for "Team Open,"  his objections to Steam's AI disclosure requirement, and the huge problems facing AAA game development.

author: PC Gamer
text:
John Carmack apologizes after Sandy Petersen says 'Quake ruined id Software,' and for once John Romero doesn't tell Sandy he's wrong
Three of the principals from the early days of id Software shared some faintly maudlin but ultimately uplifting reminiscences from those long-ago days.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Don't blame yourselves' for Destiny 2's end, community lead tells players: 'No words can accurately depict how lucky we are to have shared these worlds with you'
As Destiny 2 reaches the end, dmg04 has some reassuring words for mourning fans.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Elden Ring 'profit leakage' has Kadokawa investors looking for a new boss
If you've ever wondered why company executives prioritize shareholders over customers, well, here it is.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Forget this GTA 6 stuff, Baldur's Gate 1 and 2 just got a hot new update
And Icewind Dale, about which I don't have strong feelings, so.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Nothing has killed my GTA 6 hype faster than locking a core part of its identity behind a $20 upgrade
GTA 6's Ultimate Edition is a crime against fashion enthusiasts

author: PC Gamer
text:
The one thing Valve would change about the Steam Machine? 'Make it cheaper'
The one thing Valve would change about the Steam Machine? 'Make it cheaper'

author: PC Gamer
text:
GTA 6 is a 'singleplayer experience', leaving me to question what's going on with GTA Online
Rockstar's theatrics never change.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Knights of the Old Republic 2 was great because it peeled back Star Wars' black-and-white morality
The Light Side of the Force, now with the original fifty shades of grey.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Rockstar dropped 63 new GTA 6 screenshots, here's all of them
Each one cost 40 trillion dollars to produce.

author: PC Gamer
text:
After months of rumours, GTA 6 won't be $100 after all… except Rockstar is locking plenty of exclusive items behind that price tag
Some of those perks are… not it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Path of Exile co-creator used to think 'live service was entirely upside, in all cases', but 10 years of experience and games like Baldur's Gate 3 have shown him another way
"This is a far more nuanced field than I thought it was 10 years ago."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Here's when GTA 6 pre-orders go live in your timezone
Secure your spot in Vice City.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A proper vampire class is coming to D&D via a Vampire: The Masquerade tie-in
Ready to get your Astarion on?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Big companies told Hideo Kojima he's 'crazy' for making OD: 'It's something that no one has ever seen before'
But Xbox saved the day.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Marathon's Vault Breaker PvE mode is coming in July, and here's the twist: You leave your loot behind
This is the full-on Marathon PvE experience I've been waiting for.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Amidst mounting fears of Xbox closures, Todd Howard says Arkane is 'doing a really, really good job' on Blade
Bethesda's boss confirmed Marvel's Blade is still in the works.

author: PC Gamer
text:
After upsetting everyone by threatening to ruin Diablo 4's most powerful loot in its next season, Blizzard has decided that maybe it wasn't such a good idea after all
The Season of Death Awakening looks a lot more promising now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Grand Theft Auto 6 puts another body in the trunk: Lords of the Fallen 2 is delayed to early 2027
The delay will provide developers with more time for "iteration and polishing," and will also let CI Games avoid "a highly competitive holiday period."

author: PC Gamer
text:
EA exec says AI has helped drive 'a real rise of creativity' at its studios
Laura Miele says removing the "tedious tasks" of game development has resulted in "shorter, faster conversations around creativity and coming to alignment."
